title: 10 Herbal Teas For Eczema
description: Calendula officinalis teas contains flavonoids, carotenoids, and triterpenoid saponins, which are powerful anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. These properties help to soothe and calm irritated skin, reducing redness and inflammation associated with eczema. The saponins in Calendula officinalis teas also have a gentle cleansing effect, which can help to remove dirt and bacteria from the skin, promoting healthy skin regeneration.
